nodes.title: Frames to WebP/AVIF Notes:
widgets_values:
Requires you to save video frames.

Loop == Does video twice, second time in reverse, makes seamless loop

nodes.title: Outline Notes:
widgets_values:
Outline Thickness affects BOTH
Comic Outline Thickness OR
Darken Outline Thickness

# If Comic Outline Group is ON
# Darken Outline is turned OFF


Start with -1 to 2 for
Darken Outline

Start with -4 to -20 for:
Comic Book Outline

nodes.title: Outline Notes:
widgets_values:
Outline Thickness affects BOTH
Comic Outline Thickness OR
Darken Outline Thickness

# If Comic Outline Group is ON
# Darken Outline is turned OFF


Start with -1 to 2 for
Darken Outline

Start with -4 to -20 for:
Comic Book Outline

nodes.title: General Notes:
widgets_values:
Recommend using Booru Tag "Thick_Outlines", putting them in parethesis might help.
Gives you more wiggle room.

Pri Aggression is the "Smart" removal amount. Lower Numbers = More Aggression
(If it's blotchy, try increasing this number, the reference #s are just suggestions)

Alt Aggression is the "Dumb" removal amount. Higher Numbers = More Aggression
(If it's not getting into the crevices, try increasing this number)

Outline Darken isn't perfect, it's not a replacement;
It's meant to be used to reduce the harshness of the bg removal.
Darken outline is disabled if you enable comic book outline.

Final Cut is how much pixels you want the final mask to remove.

Set the FPS of the WebP to match the beat of the music.

nodes.title: Switch Notes:
widgets_values:
Enable Image == Do images
Enable Image + Enable Image Outline == Adds comic book outline effect

Video Frame Gen == Take video, convert it to Animated WebP (Store video frames in RAM)
Video Frame Gen + Frame Outline == Adds a comic book outline to the Animated WebP
Video Frame Gen +  In-Painting == Fills holes in an area: Read In-Paint Notes.
Video Frame Gen + Save Frames == Saves video frames to output/bgrem_frames/*.jxl for editing.

FFMPEG - Make WebP == Converts your frames to WebP

FFMPEG - Make AVIF ==Converts your frames to AVIF

FFMPEG - Make WebP (Loop) == (Hacky) Makes seamless WebP loop

FFMPEG - Make AVIF (Loop) == (Hacky) Makes seamless AVIF loop

nodes.title: In-Paint Notes:
widgets_values:
Inpaint Strength == Size of holes in-paint is trying to fill.

# Anywhere from 6 to 12 is a good starting place. Larger than 12 can get blocky. But feel free to crank it.

# Because this attempts to fill ALL holes, you will want to limit auto in-paint area using the following:

Size X and Y == The box size that auto in-paint will affect.

Inpaint Position X and Y == Where you want the box centered.
(Greater X # moves it right, Greater Y # moves it down)

Visualize Mask == Inverts the mask so that you can easily see the area of effect.

# This only attacks one problematic area. If you have multiple problematic areas.
# I suggest using a different color scheme or comic book outline.

# I don't think it's necessary to run In-Paint and Comic Book Outline at the same time.
